schemaorg_recipe: {"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"Recipe","name":"THE BEST CORN CHOWDER","description":"NOTE : Buy the absolute freshest corn you can find, and use it the day you bring it home.","recipeYield":"6","recipeIngredient":["6 ears corn, husks and silks removed","6 cups homemade or low-sodium canned chicken stock","1 bay leaf","1 teaspoon fennel seeds","1 teaspoon coriander seeds","1 teaspoon whole black peppercorns","4 ounces salt pork or slab bacon, cut into 1/2-inch cubes (optional)","3 tablespoons unsalted butter","1 medium onion, finely diced (about 1 cup)","2 medium cloves garlic, minced or grated on a Microplane (about 2 teaspoons)","1 to 2 russet (baking) potatoes, peeled and cut into 1/2-inch dice (about 11/2 cups)","Kosher salt","2 cups whole milk or half-and-half","Freshly ground black pepper","Sugar (if necessary)","3 scallions, finely sliced"]}
extracted_ingredients: 6 ears corn, husks and silks removed
6 cups homemade or low-sodium canned chicken stock
4 ounces salt pork or slab bacon, cut into 1/2-inch cubes (optional)
2 medium cloves garlic, minced or grated on a Microplane (about 2 teaspoons)
1 to 2 russet (baking) potatoes, peeled and cut into 1/2-inch dice (about 11/2 cups)
warnings: No explicit preparation/cooking instructions were present; recipeInstructions omitted.
